theories.title: Government Attempting Mass Data Erasure
theories.summary: Multiple whistleblowers report DOGE/Trump administration attempting to declare 2.7 million living Social Security recipients as 'dead' to erase them from rolls. Parallels RFK Jr.'s demand for access to individually identifiable medical records. Pattern suggests systematic data manipulation for political purposes.
theories.why_signal: Third whistleblower coming forward on same scheme suggests systemic rather than isolated abuse; connects to broader pattern of vetting bypass.

posts.title: 'DOGE' wanted to declare 2.7 million people 'dead' at Social Security: whistleblower
Whistleblower shares sinister plan to erase 2.7M living people from Social Security
RFK Jr. Seeks Access to Americans' Individually Identifiable Medical Records for Clues

theories.title: Iran War Ceasefire Theater vs Reality
theories.summary: Consistent reporting that ceasefire between US/Israel and Iran is non-functional: Israel continues attacks in Lebanon, Iran claims warning shots at destroyers, Trump 'softens' on nuclear demands while peace talks stall. Media narrative of 'ceasefire' contradicts ongoing military operations.
theories.why_signal: Cross-ideological consensus (left and right outlets) that ceasefire is fake; oil price cliff warnings suggest imminent economic shock.

posts.title: Peace Talks Stall: U.S. Denies Iranian Claims Of Warning Shots At Destroyers
Iran War: Hezbollah Rejects Israel-Favoring Ceasefire, Casting More Doubt on Deal
Stop Calling It a Ceasefire

theories.title: AI Systems Exploitable via Social Engineering
theories.summary: Hackers successfully used Meta's AI support bot to compromise high-profile Instagram accounts (Obama White House, US Space Force Chief). Demonstrates AI assistants can be manipulated to bypass security protocols. Part of broader pattern of AI security failures via prompt injection.
theories.why_signal: Real-world compromise of government accounts proves AI social engineering threat is not theoretical; escalates yesterday's score from 8 to active breach.

posts.title: Hackers Used Meta's AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
Podcast: Hackers Asked Meta AI To Let Them In. It Worked
What 2026 DBIR Confirms: Attacks Are Living in the Browser

theories.title: Markets Decoupling from Reality Signals
theories.summary: Commentary on wild single-stock price swings, AI capex recycling, crypto -50% collapse, and classic market-top indicators appearing despite bull narratives. SpaceX IPO requiring 'cultish support' from retail; JP Morgan ending Tesla bear call suggests analyst suppression.
theories.why_signal: Multiple independent market analysts (JP Morgan, TS Lombard) flagging top indicators; retail investor heroism being required signals desperation, not strength.

posts.title: Bulls declare victory in AI debate, but two classic signs of a market top are looming

theories.title: Left Populism Outperforming Centrist Democrats
theories.summary: Pro-Palestine and left-wing candidates winning primaries despite media opposition (Adam Hamawy in NJ, left populists in Iowa winning despite Trump endorsements backfiring). Establishment Dems holding CA seats but with visible cracks. Suggests grassroots leftward shift in Dem coalition.
theories.why_signal: Trump's Iowa endorsement failing signals weakening presidential coattails; left populism gains despite coordinated establishment media pushback.

theories.title: Trump Administration Vetting Completely Bypassed
theories.summary: Spy chief lacks security clearance; Todd Blanche bragging about installing 'roadblocks' in DOJ to protect Trump; multiple unvetted appointments making policy without background checks. Pattern suggests systematic circumvention of constitutional vetting processes.
theories.why_signal: Public admissions from appointees about deliberately rigging systems; security clearance gaps in intel roles represent genuine national security vulnerability.

posts.title: Shock as Trump's spy chief found to lack any security clearance
Todd Blanche brags he's rigging DOJ with 'roadblocks' to protect Trump from prosecution

theories.title: Energy Shock Cascading Through Global Economy
theories.summary: Iran oil exports at 4-year low as blockade tightens; supply chain stress driving transport costs up; Britain's borrowing outlook darkens from energy crisis; Asia facing emerging market crisis from oil-poor vulnerability. Oil cliff imminent if Iran war escalates.
theories.why_signal: Multi-jurisdiction reporting of interconnected energy shock suggests not isolated news but systemic supply-side crisis building toward inflation cascade.

posts.title: Iran Oil Exports Plunge To Four Year Low As Blockade Tightens
Britain's Borrowing Outlook Darkens As Energy Shock Deepens

theories.title: Mainstream Media Integrity Under Siege
theories.summary: CBS dismantling 60 Minutes editorial standards under Bari Weiss; Fox News branding majority of Americans as 'anti-American enemies' per Trump's NSPM-7; media increasingly serving as propaganda arm rather than watchdog. Institutional collapse of journalism.
theories.why_signal: Morley Safer's daughter directly critiquing CBS signals institutional journalists recognizing erosion of professional standards from inside.

posts.title: Fox News Defines Most Americans as Anti-American
Morley Safer of 60 Minutes was my father. He would be disgusted by what Bari Weiss is doing to CBS

theories.title: Cryptocurrency Vulnerability Exposure Cascade
theories.summary: Zcash admits 'critical counterfeiting vulnerability' exposed by Claude AI; multiple crypto projects showing single points of failure. Suggests AI research finding exploits faster than developers can patch, creating systemic instability in decentralized finance.
theories.why_signal: Claude (AI) finding zero-days in supposedly audited crypto code suggests AI tools enabling a new class of vulnerability discovery that outpaces security response.

posts.title: ZEC Crashes As Zcash Admits 'Critical Counterfeiting Vulnerability' Exposed By Claude

theories.title: Infrastructure Decay Across US Systems
theories.summary: ISS experiencing multiple air leaks since 2019 requiring crew sheltering; 900+ US gas station tank gauges exposed online; Trump administration dismantling ocean monitoring system leaving weather forecasting 'flying blind.' Systemic underfunding and abandonment of critical infrastructure.
theories.why_signal: Multiple independent infrastructure failures across space, energy, and data systems suggests widespread deferred maintenance reaching critical tipping points simultaneously.

posts.title: Astronauts briefly moved to 'safe haven' over ISS leak
Over 900 US gas station tank gauge systems exposed to attacks
